language.label: Language
language.title: Choose your language
language.description: Select the language of your book.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

cover.tagline: Where game masters and players keep their stories.

login.title: Open your book
login.subtitle: Pick up your chronicle where you left off.

register.title: Begin a new book
register.subtitle: Every legend has a first chapter.

dashboard.opener: The pages ahead are still blank. Open your first campaign and the world will begin to take shape, entry by entry.

recent.title: Your most recent campaign
recent.tomeSubtitle: Your shelf holds no volumes yet
recent.tomeDescription: Every great chronicle begins with a blank page. When you create a campaign, it will rest here — ready to be resumed at any moment of the session.

campaigns.title: Your campaigns
campaigns.empty: No campaigns recorded yet. This book's index will fill in as you create your stories.

characters.title: Your characters
characters.empty: There are no sheets in this journal yet. Heroes and companions will earn their pages soon.

world.title: Your world
world.lead: Each tome of your world will have its own voice — the same book, distinct chapters.

discover.title: Join a campaign
discover.lead: Public campaigns from other masters. Step in and take a seat.
discover.empty: No public campaigns are open right now.

new.title: Begin a new book
new.lead: Shape your next chronicle. Every choice here becomes the first page of your book.

placeholders.name: The name of your chronicle
placeholders.customTheme: Describe the theme of your world
placeholders.shortDescription: One line that sums up the campaign
placeholders.premise: How does it all begin? Write your story's premise…
placeholders.customTone: Describe the tone of your table
placeholders.password: Leave blank to require no password

validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nameMax: The name must be at most 120 characters
validation.passwordMin: The password must be at least 6 characters
validation.maxPlayers: Enter a whole number between 1 and 50

cover.hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · up to 5MB
cover.errorType: Invalid format. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.
cover.errorSize: The image must be at most 5MB.

attributes.title: Character attributes
attributes.lead: Define the attributes every character in this campaign will use — players, NPCs, allies and monsters alike.
attributes.emptyDescription: Add the first attribute to shape how characters are measured in this campaign.

share.copied: Join link copied to the clipboard.

join.title: Join the campaign
join.notFound: This campaign could not be found.
join.full: This campaign has reached its player limit.

list.title: Factions
list.lead: Kingdoms, orders and houses that shape your world.
list.emptyTitle: The Book of Heraldry is blank
list.emptyDescription: No factions recorded yet. Create the first one and give it a coat of arms or a banner.

new.title: Forge a faction
new.lead: Describe the faction richly — its symbol is created from all of this context.
new.generationNote: On creation, a coat of arms or banner is generated by AI from the context. This may take a few moments.

placeholders.name: The faction's name
placeholders.identity: Culture, aesthetics, clothing, architecture, customs, atmosphere…
placeholders.memberTraits: e.g. often red-haired or blond, tall and slender.
placeholders.recurringElements: e.g. ravens, crescent moon, silver, thorns.
placeholders.symbolPrompt: e.g. a black raven holding a sword over a golden field.

hints.identity: Free-form field for the faction's overall identity.
hints.memberTraits: Will influence characters tied to the faction later.
hints.recurringElements: Symbols and motifs that repeat across the faction.
hints.symbolPrompt: Your basic idea; the AI considers the whole campaign and faction context.

validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 3 characters

detail.generatingHint: This may take a few moments. The page updates automatically.
detail.failed: The symbol could not be generated.
detail.noSymbol: This faction has no symbol yet. Generate a coat of arms or a banner.
detail.pendingHint: A symbol was generated. Approve, reject or request adjustments.
detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the adjustments you want (e.g. darker, without the crown)…

participant.title: Participants
participant.lead: Everyone at the table — owner, master and players — and who's online right now.
participant.hubMeta: Owner, master, players and who's online.

character.hubMeta: Create and manage NPCs, creatures and key figures of your story.

list.title: Characters
list.lead: NPCs, creatures and figures shaped by the master.
list.emptyDescription: Create the first NPC, creature or figure of your story.

new.title: Create a character
new.lead: A narrative figure of the campaign — ally, monster or mystery, as the story decides.

detail.adjustHelp: Describe what you want to change. The system will try to preserve the character's identity and apply your changes.
detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the changes to the portrait…
detail.adjustExample1: Make him older, with more noble clothing.
detail.adjustExample2: Remove the sword and make the expression wearier.
detail.adjustExample3: Make it less colorful and more realistic.

hints.masterOnly: Only you (the master) can see this.

art.title: Character art direction
art.lead: Define the visual style that guides every character portrait in this campaign.
art.help: These instructions are used as the visual base for all characters in the campaign, unless a character explicitly asks to ignore them.
art.placeholder: e.g. Realistic dark fantasy, cold tones, worn medieval clothing, neutral background, no anime, no vibrant colors…

map.hubMeta: Create regions, cities, dungeons and important places of the campaign.

list.title: Maps
list.lead: Regions, cities, dungeons and places of your world, in a hierarchy.
list.emptyDescription: Draw the first region, city or place of your campaign.

new.title: Create a map
new.lead: A place of the campaign, at any scale — world, city, dungeon or a single room.

detail.adjustHelp: Describe what you want to change in the map. The system will try to preserve the concept of the place and apply your changes.
detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the changes to the map…

hints.masterOnly: Only you (the master) can see this.
hints.artDirection: Complements the campaign-wide map art direction.

art.title: Map art direction
art.lead: Define the visual style that guides every map image in this campaign.
art.help: These instructions are used as the visual base for all maps in the campaign, unless a generation explicitly ignores them.
art.placeholder: e.g. Antique parchment maps, monochrome, black ink, ornate medieval borders, dark fantasy cartography…

point.title: Points of interest
point.emptyDescription: Add landmarks, secrets and markers to this map.
point.emptyPlayers: No visible points on this map.

playerCharacter.hubMeta: Create and manage your character in this campaign.

new.title: Create your character
new.lead: Build your own playable character within the master's rules.

form.appearanceHint: Describe how your character looks — the portrait follows this.
form.privateHint: Only you and the master can see this.

attributes.title: Attributes
attributes.lead: Distribute your points across the table's attributes.
attributes.noBudget: The master hasn't defined how many points you can distribute yet.
attributes.noAttributes: This campaign has no attributes configured yet.
attributes.over: You have exceeded the point limit set by the master.

budget.title: Attribute-point budget
budget.hint: Points the player may distribute (spent = value − minimum). Leave empty to clear.

item.hubMeta: Create relics, documents, weapons, keys and important objects of the campaign.

list.title: Items
list.lead: Relics, documents, weapons and objects that matter in your story.
list.emptyDescription: Create the first relic, document or object of your campaign.

new.title: Create an item
new.lead: Define the concept/base of an item; concrete occurrences are its instances.

detail.adjustPlaceholder: Describe the changes to the item image…

hints.appearance: Used to generate the item image.
hints.masterOnly: Only you (the master) can see this.

art.title: Item art direction
art.lead: Define the visual style that guides every item image in this campaign.
art.help: These instructions are used as the visual base for all items in the campaign, unless a generation explicitly ignores them.
art.placeholder: e.g. Realistic dark fantasy, neutral background, cold tones, aged metal, medieval look, no vibrant colors…

instance.title: Instances
instance.lead: Concrete occurrences of this item in the campaign and where they are.
instance.emptyDescription: Add a concrete occurrence of this item somewhere in the campaign.
instance.emptyPlayers: No visible instances of this item.
instance.uniqueLimit: This item is unique — only one instance is allowed.
instance.locationHint: An instance is in at most one place (with a character OR on a map/point).

ability.title: Abilities
ability.lead: Powers, techniques, blessings, curses and special capabilities of the characters.
ability.hubMeta: Create powers, techniques, blessings, curses and special capabilities of the characters.
ability.emptyMaster: Create the first ability of your campaign.
ability.emptyPlayer: No public abilities in this campaign yet.

hints.masterOnly: Only you (the master) can see this.

character.title: Abilities
character.playerLead: Your approved abilities and proposals under review.
character.emptyDescription: Approved abilities and proposals will appear here.

none.title: No session in progress
none.master: Start a session to bring your players to the table.
none.player: Waiting for the master to start the session.

start.title: Start session
start.noMaps: Create at least one map before starting the session.

hub.joinMeta: A session is in progress — join the table.
hub.startMeta: Choose an initial map and bring everyone to the table.
hub.waitingMeta: Waiting for the master to start the session.

scene.buildingHint: Generating a 2.5D game view of this map. It will appear here automatically.
scene.failed: The session scene could not be generated.
scene.failedPlayer: The master will regenerate the scene.

characters.emptyDescription: Create characters in the campaign first.
characters.resizeError: Could not save the character size.
characters.moveError: Could not save the character position.
characters.addError: Could not add the character to the map.
characters.removeError: Could not remove the character from the map.

changeMap.title: Change map
changeMap.emptyDescription: Create maps in the campaign first.

createCharacter.title: Improvise a character
createCharacter.ideaHint: Optional. Describe the idea and let the AI fill the empty fields.
createCharacter.ideaPlaceholder: An old castle servant who knows something about the crypt.
createCharacter.aiDone: Empty fields filled by the AI. Review before creating.
createCharacter.aiError: Could not complete the character with AI.
createCharacter.created: Character created. The portrait is being generated.

createItem.title: Improvise an item
createItem.ideaHint: Optional. Describe the idea and let the AI fill the empty fields.
createItem.ideaPlaceholder: A small object found in the Cold Chapel that looks holy but is corrupted.
createItem.createInstance: Create an occurrence of this item now?
createItem.aiDone: Empty fields filled by the AI. Review before creating.
createItem.aiError: Could not complete the item with AI.
createItem.created: Item created. The image is being generated.

createAbility.title: Improvise an ability
createAbility.ideaHint: Optional. Describe the idea and let the AI fill the empty fields.
createAbility.ideaPlaceholder: A spiritual ability of Elias when the cracked sigil starts speaking through him.
createAbility.activeFormWarning: This ability will be exclusive to the active form.
createAbility.aiDone: Empty fields filled by the AI. Review before creating.
createAbility.aiError: Could not complete the ability with AI.

items.title: Campaign items
items.emptyDescription: Create items in the campaign to manage them here.
items.noInstances: No instances of this item yet.
items.noCharactersHint: Create characters in the campaign first.
items.giveError: Could not create the item instance.
items.unassignError: Could not remove the item holder.

poi.error: Could not save the point position.

end.confirmBody: All players will leave the current session. You can start a new session afterwards.
end.endedMaster: You ended the session. You can start a new one anytime.
end.endedPlayer: The session was ended by the master.

sheet.title: Character sheet
sheet.error: Could not load the character sheet.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.emptyDescription: This character is not carrying any items.

form.title: Change form
form.emptyDescription: This character has no alternative forms.
form.error: Could not change the character form.

characterForm.title: Forms
characterForm.emptyDescription: Create alternative forms for this character.

fields.name: Form name
fields.appearanceHint: Used to generate the form image.
